text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Holy cow! You got so many! Way to go, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And they're all so soft and cute! They look so
happy to have been grabbed up and—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I don't think I'll push my worries onto them,
after all. I can do anything on my own!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And if push comes to shove, I can always push my
worries onto you! I'll just put all these in my room!
